plan_status: adopted (as varied; Variation No.3 in progress at fetch date)
fetch_method: curl chapter PDF (Ch 15 final.pdf) + pdftotext -layout extraction
notes: Chapter 15 served as a text-based PDF (Ch 15 final.pdf, 3.7MB) linked from the portal chapter page; the HTML chapter page is a navigation shell only, so the PDF is the substantive source. Strong numeric content: plot ratio Table 15.1, site coverage maxima, 22m separation / 11m rear garden, rural road setbacks Table 15.8, car parking Table 15.9, 15% open space, EV Table 15.10. Residential density deferred to Chapter 3 Table 3.1; sightline x/y deferred to TII/NRA standards; no fixed rural one-off-house minimum site area (deferred to Rural House Design Guide Appendix 4).
